provisions.text:
(1) Any European patent application comprising more than fifteen claims shall, in respect of the sixteenth and each subsequent claim, incur payment of claims fees as laid down in the Rules relating to Fees.
(2) The claims fees shall be paid within one month of filing the first set of claims. If the claims fees have not been paid in due time, they may still be paid within one month of a communication concerning the failure to observe the time limit.
(3) If a claims fee is not paid in due time, the claim concerned shall be deemed to be abandoned.

(1) The fees due to be paid to the Office under Article 1 RFees, unless otherwise provided in paragraph 2, are as follows:
1. Filing fee
(Article 78, paragraph 2 EPC)
(i) where the European patent application or, in the case of an international application, the form for entry into the European phase (EPO Form 1200) is filed online135
(ii) where the European patent application or, in the case of an international application, the form for entry into the European phase (EPO Form 1200) is not filed online285
1a. Additional fee
for a European patent application comprising more than 35 pages (not counting pages forming part of a sequence listing) (Rule 38, paragraph 2 EPC)plus EUR 17 for the 36th and each subsequent page
1b. Additional fee
in the case of a divisional application filed in respect of any earlier application which is itself a divisional application (Rule 38, paragraph 4 EPC)
– fee for a divisional application of second generation 235
– fee for a divisional application of third generation 480
– fee for a divisional application of fourth generation 715
– fee for a divisional application of fifth or any subsequent generation 955
2. Search fee in respect of
– a European or supplementary European search (Article 78, paragraph 2 EPC, Rule 62 EPC, Rule 64, paragraph 1 EPC, Rule 56a, paragraph 8 EPC, Article 153, paragraph 7 EPC, Rule 164, paragraphs 1 EPC and Rule 164, paragraphs 2 EPC)1 595
– an international search (Rule 16.1 PCT, Rule 40bis PCT in conjunction with Rule 20.5bis PCT, and Rule 158, paragraph 1 EPC)1 885
– a supplementary international search (Rule 45bis.3(a) PCT)1 885
3. Designation fee
for one or more Contracting States (Article 79, paragraph 2 EPC) in respect of an application filed on or after 1 April 2009720
4. Renewal fees
For the European patent application (Article 86, paragraph 1 EPC), calculated in each case from the date of filing of the application
– for the 3rd year 725
– for the 4th year 885
– for the 5th year 1 050
– for the 6th year 1 215
– for the 7th year 1 375
– for the 8th year 1 540
– for the 9th year 1 700
– for the 10th and each subsequent year 1 865
5. Additional fee
for belated payment of a renewal fee for the European patent application (Rule 51, paragraph 2 EPC)50% of the belated renewal fee
6. Examination fee
(Article 94, paragraph 1 EPC) in respect of
– a European patent application or an international application for which a supplementary European search report is drawn up under Article 153, paragraph 72 010
– an international application for which no supplementary European search report is drawn up under Article 153, paragraph 72 240
7. Fee for grant
including fee for publication of the European patent specification (Rule 71, paragraph 3 EPC), in respect of an application filed on or after 1 April 20091 135
10. Opposition fee
(Article 99, paragraph 1 EPC, Article 105, paragraph 2 EPC)880
10a. Limitation or revocation fee
(Article 105a, paragraph 1 EPC)
– request for limitation 1 425
– request for revocation 645
11. Fee for appeal
(Article 108 EPC) for an appeal filed
– by any person referred to in Rule 7a, paragraph 2 (a) EPC to Rule 7a, paragraph 2 (d) EPC2 015
– by any other person2 925
11a. Fee for petition for review
(Article 112a, paragraph 4 EPC)3 570
12. Fee for further processing
(Rule 135, paragraph 1 EPC)
– in the event of late payment of a fee 50% of the relevant fee
– in the event of late performance of the acts required under Rule 71, paragraph 3 EPC315
– other cases 315
13. Fee for re-establishment of rights/fee for requesting restoration/fee for reinstatement of rights
(Rule 136, paragraph 1 EPC, Rule 26bis.3(d) PCT, Rule 49ter.2(d) PCT, Rule 49.6(d)(i) PCT)790
14. Conversion fee
(Article 135, paragraph 3 EPC, Article 140 EPC)0
14a. Fee for late furnishing of a sequence listing
(Rule 30, paragraph 3 EPC)280
15. Claims fee
(Rule 45, paragraph 1 EPC, Rule 71, paragraph 4 EPC, Rule 162, paragraph 1 EPC) in respect of an application filed on or after 1 April 2009
– for the 16th and each subsequent claim up to the limit of 50 290
– for the 51st and each subsequent claim 720
16. Fee for the awarding of costs
(Rule 88, paragraph 3 EPC)95
18. Transmittal fee for an international application
(Rule 157, paragraph 4 EPC)160
19. Fee for the preliminary examination of an international application
(Rule 58 PCT and Rule 158, paragraph 2 EPC)2 010
20. Fee for a technical opinion
(Article 25 EPC)4 790
21. Protest fee
(Rule 158, paragraph 3 EPC, Rule 40.2(e) PCT, Rule 68.3(e) PCT)1 070
22. Review fee
(Rule 45bis.6(c) PCT)1 070
(2) For European patent applications filed before 1 April 2009 and international applications which entered the regional phase before that date, the amount of the fees specified in Article 2, item 3 RFees, Article 2, item 3a RFees, Article 2, item 7 RFees and Article 2, item 15 of the Rules relating to Fees as in force until 31 March 2009 shall be as follows:
3. Designation fee
for each contracting state designated (Article 79, paragraph 2 EPC), designation fees being deemed paid for all contracting states upon payment of seven times the amount of this fee125
3a. Joint designation fee
for the Swiss Confederation and the Principality of Liechtenstein 125
7. Fee for grant
including fee for printing the European patent specification (Rule 71, paragraph 3 EPC), where the application documents to be printed comprise:
7.1 not more than 35 pages1 135
7.2 more than 35 pages The amount of item 7.1plus EUR 19 for the 36th and each subsequent page
15. Claims fee
for the sixteenth and each subsequent claim (Rule 45, paragraph 1 EPC, Rule 71, paragraph 4 EPC, Rule 162, paragraph 1 EPC)290
